textByHash.645180c1a88aa39fbd2cd8139d84e109748d016c: Why, hello there, lad. Me friends call me Ned. I was a man of the sea, but it's past me now. Could I be making or selling you some rope?
textByHash.eb6789bdb1d162e0ec752eae370a2c5b1dc3c6a5: Why, hello there, lass. Me friends call me Ned. I was a man of the sea, but it's past me now. Could I be making or selling you some rope?
textByHash.98296e14e8ccde0fedc4c3a192e27224575a2f6e: Why, hello there, kid. Me friends call me Ned. I was a man of the sea, but it's past me now. Could I be making or selling you some rope?
textByHash.59b0c663a0ae720e37f929252271e37a33b0e484: Well, I was a sailor. I've not been able to get work at sea these days, though. They say I'm too old.
textByHash.949e21c12b9ff0de257069a2fa85d0e6f3162ae1: Sorry, where was it you said you wanted to go?
textByHash.9abd9f4527b148c7df90dadfdb1de317becf5080: But... It would be a chance to sail a ship once more. I'd sail anywhere if it was a chance to sail again.
textByHash.58b97d4ff568034de47fc86e775e49cd5a124ab3: Then again, no captain in his right mind would sail to that island...
textByHash.07ec69729ba1b1cbf0ae6afb2520512dcecbac3e: Ah, you only live once! I'll do it!
textByHash.5ce1c4062bbcd47dd8accf461a187de6060068ff: Ah, well. Let me know when you do. The place to look would be Port Sarim.
textByHash.003d7f6df0498ef0576d8ff36d166167937608aa: That old pile of junk? Last I heard, she wasn't seaworthy.
textByHash.7551514ca141e3bb3173dc691b0a8d1a6bfcf276: Just show me the map and we can get ready to go!
textByHash.e82bc5ec1cf038ec436becf64a17a0e6bc31e7fa: Excellent! I'll meet you at the ship, then.
textByHash.6e6518a7d59451867d39a7f1daf4d83912119532: You'd better go find it, then. I'm not going to go sailing off without a map to show me where to head!
textByHash.3a2d47ef08845eaf194a9514102bea4fcc97323f: Hello again, lad. Something I can help you with? Want to buy some rope perhaps?
textByHash.65f7c4285e5a219e1f06e826e4a91ef058cf7cf2: Hello again, lass. Something I can help you with? Want to buy some rope perhaps?
textByHash.a7bd7351e224bf62e5cb9572f1e7d6cab3e2f41e: Hello again, kid. Something I can help you with? Want to buy some rope perhaps?
textByHash.baa39bbd99d30bb7cecd2fa086214187a737aef2: I said I would and old Ned is a man of his word!
textByHash.51dbe50665aefc67490894bf41f89aca716e1f4c: I said I would and old Ned is a man of his word! I'll meet you on board the Lady Lumbridge in Port Sarim.
textByHash.5ca8a17a039ce2d8f621810b48e777145c20c565: I'm sure I can. What are you thinking of?
textByHash.e3ce69aeb9956107b21f57b97cdbc543d40aabc4: Do I look like a member of a sewing circle? Be off wi' you. I have fought monsters that would turn your hair blue.
textByHash.1830525dababcfdcd948eaf691dac915608eac03: I don't need to be laughed at just 'cos I'm getting a bit old.
textByHash.edc2ab919b73173dd8018531539b9b6eee013cad: Well... That's an interesting thought. Yes, I think I could do something. Give me 3 balls of wool and I might be able to do it.
textByHash.fc8646aa7a26727a9362640e82268e6e08109268: Okay, I will have a go.
textByHash.658025f7c206e6402cef5dc53021da7129bdeb43: Here you go. How's that for a quick effort? Not bad I think!
textByHash.041570d1afb270a5fb8adf5741c58ec7b1f2bd20: Well, it sounds like a challenge. Come to me if you need one.
textByHash.f8e3d51fb54e70923551c3e270d3434121c58485: Ah yes, it's a tough world these days. There's a few brave enough to attack from ten metres away.
textByHash.549615514c6c2eb8ea39debe14a17edb2d181bde: There you go, good as new.
textByHash.c494626b2605203448a1fe513d2af070416fdd01: Well... that's an interesting thought. Yes, I think I could do something. Give me three balls of wool and I might be able to do it.
textByHash.a23b5d8365f9f027eaef4dc6a26c9f5335946724: I got towed back by a passing friendly whale.
textByHash.fe39b53a8fe0e7d54b152725456cee999cf4a2c4: Anyway, would you like me to make some rope while you're here?
textByHash.8a7dbe3b982370070e5a9e2d6eb102ddd7475f53: Aye, that I could. I'll meet you at the Port Sarim docks again. I'll try to steer a little better this time!
textByHash.68ae9867679d32c2e72327de525f0cad2f2e9f9c: Well, I can sell you some rope for 15 coins. Or I can be making you some if you gets me 4 balls of wool. I strands them together I does, makes em strong.
textByHash.bdcb5844a8f14d629e9c042568e14be9a56947ea: Do you want some rope or not?
textByHash.67a8c0ff4ed7e7e324d1581c1cab8730519cfb2c: There you go, finest rope in Gielinor.
textByHash.affb123303824af12eea014556f0a1fe0634f0fc: Oh, I confess. You have found the truth. I used to make the rope myself, but my fingers aren't as nimble as they used to be and so many people wanted my rope. Demand was so high I had to find another
textByHash.59747cf177aadcdcf2c852a39b37fe1a62374603: source. But I couldn't tell anyone since Ned's Handmade Rope (100% Wool) is a high profile brand now.
textByHash.22d7cac2ce232655be2b5510149fa502f13607e3: Thanks. Here take this, a free sample! Please, don't tell anyone.
textByHash.b8ad17ffabfaf4725d6ed299bd55fe0d828c1a80: Oh, if you're in the Isles again, tell Jofridr that her Neddie will be there soon.
textByHash.85fab715043b079a1ea68d4166870782142d6897: Well, if you ever need rope that's the price. Sorry. An old sailor needs money for a little drop o' rum.
textByHash.800d1aa7f10855b35ddd2c53b186665987bdca95: Aye, you do that. Remember, it takes 4 balls of wool to make strong rope.
textByHash.43f6bdd243d7a10ebd5aa981b51868c94ce9a689: Well, old Neddy is always here if you do. Tell your friends. I can always be using the business.
textByHash.f96e55d8764b04a354e07def06b92a014ad26e1c: Good work! I have new information to share with you. Listen carefully, now!
textByHash.be87ce3844977f6550dd65d86be9345882de55a3: A place 65 steps forward and 17 to the right needs an inspection. The weather vane up high will guide you in the right direction.
textByHash.84a582f39912fd411a9fa6da1212fa6c82910d7a: Under the ground lies the next clue you seek. Getting it out requires a little technique.
